problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Reservoir computing with physical substrate is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
